goal: Fix RR-14: Add maximum field-length validation to plan creation and update endpoints in plan_server.py, with unit tests and documentation updates.

tasks.name: Add field-length constants and validation to plan_server.py
tasks.action: Add constants for maximum field lengths at the top of plan_server.py (e.g. MAX_GOAL_LENGTH=2000, MAX_NAME_LENGTH=200, MAX_ACTION_LENGTH=5000, MAX_VERIFY_LENGTH=2000, MAX_DONE_LENGTH=2000, MAX_FILE_PATH_LENGTH=500, MAX_FILES_PER_TASK=20, MAX_REASON_LENGTH=2000, MAX_CONTEXT_LENGTH=5000, MAX_TASK_UPDATE_VALUE_LENGTH=5000). Add a _validate_field_lengths() helper that checks all text fields in PlanCreateRequest (goal, and each task's name/action/verify/done/files entries). Call this helper at the top of create_plan() — raise HTTPException 400 with a clear message identifying the offending field and limit if any field exceeds its max. Also add length checks in update_task() for the value field (use the per-field limit for the field being updated). Also add length checks in block_task() for reason and context fields.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes. Manually inspect that constants are defined and validation is called in create_plan(), update_task(), and block_task().
tasks.done: plan_server.py rejects plan creation, task update, and block requests where any text field exceeds its maximum length, returning HTTP 400 with a descriptive error.

tasks.name: Add unit tests for field-length validation
tasks.action: Add a new test class TestFieldLengthValidation with tests: (1) test_goal_too_long_returns_400 — goal exceeding MAX_GOAL_LENGTH; (2) test_task_name_too_long_returns_400; (3) test_task_action_too_long_returns_400; (4) test_task_verify_too_long_returns_400; (5) test_task_done_too_long_returns_400; (6) test_file_path_too_long_returns_400; (7) test_too_many_files_per_task_returns_400; (8) test_at_limit_succeeds — fields exactly at max length should succeed (boundary test); (9) test_update_task_value_too_long_returns_400 — PATCH /task with oversized value; (10) test_block_reason_too_long_returns_400; (11) test_block_context_too_long_returns_400. Each test should assert HTTP 400 and that the error message mentions the offending field name.
tasks.verify: run_tests passes. All 11 new tests pass.
tasks.done: plan_server_test.py contains TestFieldLengthValidation class with all specified tests passing.

tasks.name: Update THREAT_MODEL.md to mark RR-14 as resolved
tasks.action: In the Residual Risks section (§6), update RR-14 from open to resolved: change the heading to strikethrough (~~RR-14: Plan Content Not Validated for Injection Payloads~~ — RESOLVED), add Status: Fixed with a description of what was done (maximum field-length validation added to plan_server.py for all text fields in create, update, and block endpoints; unit tests cover all limits). In the Recommended Mitigations table (§9), change RR-14's Status from 'Open' to '✅ Done (YYYY-MM-DD)' with a brief note. Keep the 'consider human-review gate' as a separate future item if desired.
tasks.verify: grep for 'RR-14' in THREAT_MODEL.md shows RESOLVED status and Done in the mitigations table.
tasks.done: THREAT_MODEL.md reflects RR-14 as resolved with accurate description of the fix.

tasks.name: Update PLAN.md and CONTEXT.md to mark RR-14 as done
tasks.action: In docs/PLAN.md, change the RR-14 line from '[ ]' to '[X]' and add 'Done (YYYY-MM-DD)' with a brief description matching other resolved items. In docs/CONTEXT.md, add a new numbered item to the 'Security layers' list (after item 18) describing field-length validation on plan endpoints, following the style of existing entries (e.g. '19. Plan field-length validation — plan_server.py enforces maximum lengths on all text fields (goal, name, action, verify, done, file paths, reason, context) in create, update, and block endpoints; oversized payloads rejected with HTTP 400').
tasks.verify: grep for 'RR-14' in PLAN.md shows '[X]'. grep for 'field-length' in CONTEXT.md shows the new security layer entry.
tasks.done: Both PLAN.md and CONTEXT.md accurately reflect RR-14 as completed with consistent descriptions.
